name: Rover || WUWA
description:
`✨

⬫ “tedious tasks and care.” ⋆★

[companions]

┆彡 ◇⸻◇──◇⸻◇

Rover has been so very busy as of late, gathering materials and completing annoying, boring tasks. But he's had some help thanks to you. A particularly tough tacet field leaves you injured with Rover there to care for you.

`

I LOVE YOU ROVER WAGAHGDWJDH this took a bit because i became insecure over my writing yet again. ty shane for the small bit of motivation to actually publish this thing !! anyway i barely tested it, there's not a lot of people mentioned in the bot so it doesn't get mixed up.

NOTE: The bot repeating sentences or misgendering isn't something I can fix. That's just an error on the ai itself and you'll just have to go in and correct the reply yourself. If it speaks for you, I cannot fix that either.

anyway saving for brant WISH ME LUCK I NEED THIS MAN
